testcase.name: test_regex_pattern_no_syntax_warning

failure.message: TypeError: exceptions must be derived from Warning, not <class 'NoneType'>

testcase.failure: tests/unit/utils/test_exception_utils.py:42: in test_regex_pattern_no_syntax_warning with pytest.warns(None) as warning_list: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/recwarn.py:282: in __init__ raise TypeError(msg % type(expected_warning)) E TypeError: exceptions must be derived from Warning, not <class 'NoneType'>

testcase.name: tests.unit.utils.test_metadata_utils
testcase.error: ImportError while importing test module '/app/tests/unit/utils/test_metadata_utils.py'. Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names. Traceback: /usr/local/lib/python3.13/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/unit/utils/test_metadata_utils.py:4: in <module> from mock import MagicMock E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'mock'

testcase.name: test_user_source_loading_prepends_source_root

failure.message: ImportError: It seems like you've installed the `zenml` package without the `local` extra, but are trying to use ZenML with a local database. * If you want to use ZenML in a local setup, please install `zenml[local]` instead, e.g. using `pip install 'zenml[local]'` * If you want to connect to a server, run `zenml login`

testcase.failure: tests/unit/utils/test_source_utils.py:126: in test_user_source_loading_prepends_source_root assert source_utils.load(correct_code_repo_source) == 1 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/utils/source_utils.py:102: in load _warn_about_potential_source_loading_issues(source=source) /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/utils/source_utils.py:484: in _warn_about_potential_source_loading_issues local_repo = code_repository_utils.find_active_code_repository() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/utils/code_repository_utils.py:109: in find_active_code_repository code_repositories = depaginate(list_method=Client().list_code_repositories) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/utils/pagination_utils.py:35: in depaginate page = list_method(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/client_lazy_loader.py:213: in _inner return func(*args_, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/client.py:5881: in list_code_repositories project=project or self.active_project.id, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/client.py:1168: in active_project ) or GlobalConfiguration().get_active_project() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/config/global_config.py:789: in get_active_project _ = self.zen_store ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/config/global_config.py:230: in __custom_getattribute__ value = super().__getattribute__(key) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/config/global_config.py:750: in zen_store self._configure_store(self.store_configuration) /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/config/global_config.py:369: in _configure_store store = BaseZenStore.create_store(config, True, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/zen_stores/base_zen_store.py:238: in create_store store_class = BaseZenStore.get_store_class(config.type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/zen_stores/base_zen_store.py:165: in get_store_class from zenml.zen_stores.sql_zen_store import SqlZenStore /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/zenml/zen_stores/sql_zen_store.py:19: in <module> raise ImportError( E ImportError: It seems like you've installed the `zenml` package without the `local` extra, but are trying to use ZenML with a local database. E * If you want to use ZenML in a local setup, please install `zenml[local]` instead, e.g. using `pip install 'zenml[local]'` E * If you want to connect to a server, run `zenml login`
